items.headline: Lumentum to join the Nasdaq-100 Index before market open on May 18, 2026
Lumentum reported fiscal Q3 2026 results with revenue up 90.1% year over year and non-GAAP EPS of $2.37
Lumentum announced a new 240,000-square-foot U.S. manufacturing facility in Greensboro to support AI optical device production
Lumentum shares fell about 9% as AI optics profit-taking hit the group
